metcon.name: Part B
metcon.description:
Rest 4 min
16 min AMRAP — split anyhow
4 Wall Walks
40 V-Ups
4 Wall Walks
60 Push-Ups
4 Wall Walks
80 Air Squats
4 Wall Walks
40 Pull-Ups
Then max reps KB Clean & Jerk in remaining time

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today hammers pushing (shoulders, triceps) and leg volume; build pulling strength and posterior chain balance.

raw_text:
Warm up | 200m row
10 air squats
8 KB deadlifts
6 KB goblet squats
6 empty bar hang muscle snatch
6 push-ups
10 tuck sits
Barbell
5 hang high pulls
5 hang muscle snatch
5 hang power snatch
Build to workout load
Partner workout | 18 min AMRAP — alternate full rounds
200m Row
8 Hang Power Snatch @45/30
12 KB Goblet Squats @24/16
Part B | Rest 4 min
16 min AMRAP — split anyhow
4 Wall Walks
40 V-Ups
4 Wall Walks
60 Push-Ups
4 Wall Walks
80 Air Squats
4 Wall Walks
40 Pull-Ups
Then max reps KB Clean & Jerk in remaining time
siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Part B. AMRAP 4 minutes: 4 Wall Walks, 40 V-Ups, 4 Wall Walks, 60 Push-Ups, 4 Wall Walks. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats), biceps, rear delts.
